hard misleading paths present: proposal planner must avoid literalization.

domain.role: keeps the input in scent-led interpretation rather than generic atmosphere

scent-into-air.role: supports diffusion into air rather than literal bloom

lavender-botanical-trace.role: permits a light botanical remainder without making it literal

generic moist atmosphere.role: argues for floral/herbal scent rather than generic mist

literal lavender field illustration.role: the input names scent, not field scenery

不要把香气塌成 generic moist atmosphere

notes: Kept scent-led ordering explicit because this sample anchors the floral/herbal domain.
